templates.name: Matter Onboarding Reminder
templates.description: Sends notification to complete the onboarding checklist when a client transitions to ONBOARDING status

actionConfig.title: Complete onboarding: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.message: Client {{customer.name}} has entered the onboarding phase. Please complete the onboarding checklist, including FICA verification, conflict check, and engagement letter.

templates.name: Engagement Letter Follow-up
templates.description: Creates a follow-up task when an engagement letter (proposal) is sent to the client

actionConfig.title: Follow up on engagement letter: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.description: The engagement letter for {{customer.name}} was sent. Follow up to confirm receipt and obtain signed copy.

templates.name: Investment Maturity Reminder
templates.description: Sends a notification 30 days before a trust investment reaches its maturity date

actionConfig.title: Trust investment maturing in 30 days
actionConfig.message: A trust investment is approaching maturity. Review the investment and plan for reinvestment or withdrawal.

templates.name: Reconciliation Overdue Reminder
templates.description: Sends a notification when a trust account reconciliation has not been completed within 35 days of the period end

actionConfig.title: Trust reconciliation overdue
actionConfig.message: A trust account reconciliation is overdue. Section 35 of the Legal Practice Act requires timely reconciliation of trust accounts.

templates.name: Pending Approval Aging
templates.description: Sends a reminder when a trust transaction has been awaiting approval for more than 48 hours

actionConfig.title: Trust payment approval pending over 48 hours
actionConfig.message: A trust transaction has been awaiting approval for more than 48 hours. Please review and action pending approvals.
